title: Cross-compilation without CGO_ENABLED=0
makefile_snippet:
build-linux:
	GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/api-linux ./cmd/api
expected_feedback: For a pure-Go binary, cross-compilation should set CGO_ENABLED=0 to produce a static binary. This is conditional on the project being pure-Go: a cgo project instead needs CGO_ENABLED=1 plus a cross C toolchain, so do not blanket-apply CGO_ENABLED=0.
